name: biookf
description: BioOKF: curate, visualize, and reason over biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles from Codex. Bundles the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live BioOKF Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app.

interface.shortDescription: Curate and visualize biomedical knowledge bases.
interface.longDescription: BioOKF gives Codex the bokf MCP tools, CLI launcher, and BioOKF Studio control loop for creating, validating, querying, and visualizing typed biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles.
defaultPrompt: Open BioOKF Studio and inspect the active knowledge base.
Ingest this review into a BioOKF bundle with provenance.
Verify this BioOKF bundle and fix every error.
